title: Placer Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Placer with a Z-Score of +3.09. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Placer is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Z-Score of +3.09 indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The high temperature is also accompanied by high humidity, with an Umidita of 85%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The low wind speed of 7.3 km/h is also contributing to the heat, as it is not providing any relief from the high temperatures.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
